CustomField.description: Close-stage approval gate (Negotiation and Close). Checked when finance has approved the commercial terms (AWU rate, commit). Lightweight checkbox gate in lieu of a formal ApprovalProcess (4-5 person founder-consensus org, zero-Apex; consistent with Quoting D-1). Enforced at 6. Closed Won on RT LAND by LAND_Close_Requires_Approvals (INACTIVE). Activation by Nic via Security and Access.
CustomField.label: Finance Approved
